chapters.title: Before you start (ITR-2)
chapters.subtitle: Text guide only — portal screenshots arrive when the intern Word pack is ready.
tips: This is a text scaffold for ITR-2. Screenshot walkthrough needs the intern Word file.
warnings: Do not invent numbers. Use LastMinute compute values when unlocked.

steps.title: Open portal
steps.plainEnglish: Open the Income Tax portal in a new tab beside LastMinute.

steps.title: Confirm ITR-2
steps.clickPath: File Income Tax Return → select form
steps.plainEnglish: Only continue if LastMinute routed you to ITR-2.

chapters.title: Login and start filing
chapters.subtitle: Same login path as ITR-1; pick the correct form on the portal.

steps.title: Login
steps.plainEnglish: Sign in with PAN/Aadhaar.

steps.title: AY 2026-27 Online
steps.plainEnglish: Select AY 2026-27 and Online mode.

steps.title: Select ITR-2
steps.plainEnglish: Choose ITR-2 and proceed.

chapters.title: Salary (if applicable)
chapters.subtitle: Income Sources → Salary
chapters.portalPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
warnings: Skip the entire salary schedule if you had no employer salary this year.
Investors with only capital gains should not enter salary fields.

steps.title: Gross salary u/s 17(1)
steps.clickPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
steps.plainEnglish: Enter only when Form 16 exists; otherwise skip this schedule.

steps.title: Exempt allowances u/s 10 (HRA/LTA)
steps.clickPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
steps.plainEnglish: Match Form 16 exempt totals when salary is present.

steps.title: Standard deduction u/s 16(ia)
steps.clickPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
steps.plainEnglish: Required when salary head is active; copy exact computed amount.

steps.title: Net salary income
steps.clickPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
steps.plainEnglish: Verify portal net salary matches our head total.

steps.title: Entire salary schedule
steps.clickPath: Gross Total Income → Income from Salary/Pension
steps.plainEnglish: Skip all salary rows when gross salary is zero in our summary.

chapters.title: Capital gains schedule
chapters.subtitle: Income Sources → Capital Gains
warnings: Use broker tax P&L or capital gains statement — not sale proceeds alone.
LTCG u/s 112A exemption of ₹1.25L is applied before entering taxable LTCG.

steps.title: STCG u/s 111A (listed equity/MF)
steps.plainEnglish: Listed equity short-term gains taxed at 15% — net after set-off.

steps.title: LTCG u/s 112A (listed equity/MF)
steps.plainEnglish: Taxable LTCG after ₹1.25L annual exemption on listed equity.

steps.title: Other capital gains (property, debt MF, etc.)
steps.plainEnglish: Non-112A gains use slab or special rates — enter net taxable amount.

steps.title: Presumptive business u/s 44AD
steps.plainEnglish: ITR-2 has no presumptive business schedule — use ITR-4 if applicable.

steps.title: Schedule FA (foreign assets)
steps.plainEnglish: Skip unless our profile flags foreign assets — expert review recommended.

chapters.title: Other sources income
chapters.subtitle: Income Sources → Other Sources
warnings: Cross-check FD and dividend lines with AIS before entering.
Enter gross savings interest before 80TTA/80TTB deduction.

steps.title: FD / term deposit interest
steps.plainEnglish: Fully taxable interest — must match 26AS TDS credits.

steps.title: Savings account interest (gross)
steps.plainEnglish: Enter gross interest; 80TTA/80TTB is claimed in deductions.

steps.title: Dividend income
steps.plainEnglish: Dividends are taxable in your hands even if TDS was deducted.

steps.title: Total other sources
steps.plainEnglish: Verify portal OS total matches our computed head.

steps.title: Lottery / game winnings
steps.plainEnglish: Skip unless you reported such income in our questionnaire.

chapters.title: Deductions and tax benefits
chapters.subtitle: Deductions → Chapter VI-A
warnings: Capital gains tax rates are separate — do not offset CG with 80C.
New regime blocks most Chapter VI-A deductions except 80CCD(2).

steps.title: Section 80C
steps.plainEnglish: Old regime only — capped at ₹1.5 lakh combined.

steps.title: Section 80D
steps.plainEnglish: Health insurance premium deduction when old regime selected.

steps.title: Section 80CCD(1B)
steps.plainEnglish: Additional NPS up to ₹50,000 — separate from 80C cap.

steps.title: Section 80CCD(2)
steps.plainEnglish: Employer NPS allowed in both old and new regime.

steps.title: Section 80G
steps.plainEnglish: Enter eligible donation amount after qualifying limits.

steps.title: Section 80U
steps.plainEnglish: Select No when no disability deduction applies.

steps.title: Section 80TTA / 80TTB
steps.plainEnglish: Deselect portal default if our computed savings-interest deduction is zero.

chapters.title: Tax computation
chapters.subtitle: Tax Paid and Verification → Part D
chapters.portalPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
warnings: Special-rate CG tax is added to slab tax — compare full Part D, not salary alone.
Refund and payable are mutually exclusive — verify sign matches our net payable.

steps.title: Gross total income
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: Sum of all heads before Chapter VI-A — must match before deductions.

steps.title: Total Chapter VI-A deductions
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: Old-regime deductions reduce taxable income on portal.

steps.title: Net tax payable / refund
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: Positive = pay more; negative = refund — use recommended regime result.

steps.title: TDS on salary
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: Must reconcile with Form 16 Part-A and Form 26AS.

steps.title: TDS on other income
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: FD, dividend, and broker TDS from 26AS.

steps.title: Advance / self-assessment tax
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: Enter challan payments you made during the year.

steps.title: Surcharge on tax
steps.clickPath: Tax on Total Income → Taxes Paid
steps.plainEnglish: Leave blank unless our summary shows surcharge — rare below ₹50L income.

chapters.title: E-verify and receipt
chapters.subtitle: Same Aadhaar OTP path as ITR-1 after preview/submit.

steps.title: Preview and submit
steps.plainEnglish: Preview totals, then submit on the portal.

steps.title: E-verify with Aadhaar OTP
steps.plainEnglish: Verify within 30 days. Download the receipt.
